From the code and README:

2. `cluster_consult` - src/clusterConsult.ts:120 (successful cluster consult)
3. `cluster_consult_failed` - src/clusterConsult.ts:148 (failed cluster consult)
4. `cluster_refresh` - src/clusterRefresh.ts:97 (successful verify-only cluster refresh)
5. `cluster_refresh_required` - src/clusterConsult.ts:69 (stale factsheet detected before cluster_consult)


6. `factsheet_static_verified` - src/db.ts:837
7. `factsheet_partially_static_verified` - src/db.ts:831

10. `factsheet_rejected` - src/db.ts:842
11. `factsheet_stale` - src/clusterRefresh.ts:80 (stale factsheet found by cluster_refresh)
12. `llm_verifier` - src/cluster.ts:236 (LLM verifier path)
13. `tool_profile_downgraded` - src/tools.ts:325 and src/clusterConsult.ts:138
14. `bare_probe_failed` - src/runtime.ts:148 (bare profile not available)

The README documents 13 event types but misses `bare_probe_failed`, which I found in the runtime code. The quality comparison file lists 14 claimed types including `factsheet_generated` that isn't in the README, though it appears to be a legitimate event type that can be written when neither verified nor rejected statuses apply.

content.text:
Based on the codebase, here are all event types written to `cluster_events`:

| Event Type | Location | When Written |
|---|---|---|
| `cluster_created` | `src/db.ts:585` | New cluster is created |
| `cluster_consult` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:120` | Successful cluster consult |
| `cluster_consult_failed` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:148` | Failed cluster consult |
| `cluster_refresh` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts:97` | Successful verify-only refresh |
| `cluster_refresh_required` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:69` | Stale factsheet detected before consult |
| `factsheet_static_verified` | `src/db.ts:837` | Factsheet passed static verification |
| `factsheet_partially_static_verified` | `src/db.ts:831` | Static verification with some rejected facts |
| `factsheet_llm_verified` | `src/db.ts:840` | Factsheet passed LLM verification |
| `factsheet_partially_llm_verified` | `src/db.ts:834` | LLM verification with some rejected facts |
| `factsheet_rejected` | `src/db.ts:842` | Factsheet rejected by verifier |
| `factsheet_stale` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts:80` | Stale factsheet found during refresh |
| `llm_verifier` | `src/cluster.ts:236` | LLM verifier path completed |
| `tool_profile_downgraded` | `src/tools.ts:328`, `src/clusterConsult.ts:138` | Profile downgrade occurred |
| `bare_probe_failed` | `src/runtime.ts:148` | Bare tool profile not available |

**Total: 14 event types**

Note: The README (`README.md:792-808`) lists 13 types but is missing `bare_probe_failed`, which is written in `src/runtime.ts:148`.

result:
Based on the codebase, here are all event types written to `cluster_events`:

| Event Type | Location | When Written |
|---|---|---|
| `cluster_created` | `src/db.ts:585` | New cluster is created |
| `cluster_consult` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:120` | Successful cluster consult |
| `cluster_consult_failed` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:148` | Failed cluster consult |
| `cluster_refresh` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts:97` | Successful verify-only refresh |
| `cluster_refresh_required` | `src/clusterConsult.ts:69` | Stale factsheet detected before consult |
| `factsheet_static_verified` | `src/db.ts:837` | Factsheet passed static verification |
| `factsheet_partially_static_verified` | `src/db.ts:831` | Static verification with some rejected facts |
| `factsheet_llm_verified` | `src/db.ts:840` | Factsheet passed LLM verification |
| `factsheet_partially_llm_verified` | `src/db.ts:834` | LLM verification with some rejected facts |
| `factsheet_rejected` | `src/db.ts:842` | Factsheet rejected by verifier |
| `factsheet_stale` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts:80` | Stale factsheet found during refresh |
| `llm_verifier` | `src/cluster.ts:236` | LLM verifier path completed |
| `tool_profile_downgraded` | `src/tools.ts:328`, `src/clusterConsult.ts:138` | Profile downgrade occurred |
| `bare_probe_failed` | `src/runtime.ts:148` | Bare tool profile not available |

**Total: 14 event types**

Note: The README (`README.md:792-808`) lists 13 types but is missing `bare_probe_failed`, which is written in `src/runtime.ts:148`.
